insights.title: Rajasthan Royals won this contest
insights.body: Mumbai Indians scored 164/5 and Rajasthan Royals replied with 165/3. SPD Smith was Player of the Match.

insights.title: Dot-ball pressure told a story
insights.body: Rajasthan Royals faced 48% dot balls — fewer scoring opportunities usually means a harder innings in T20 cricket.

insights.title: Death overs defined the tempo
insights.body: Mumbai Indians scored at 16.2 runs per over in overs 16–20, 17% dots in that phase.
